name: install
full_help:
install

Description: 
Install board

Syntax: 
install  [-quiet] [-verbose] <board>

Returns: 
Nothing

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <board>     Name of board to install

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
